title: 10 medicinal preparations of Angelica dahurica  (baikal angelica)

preparations_list.preparation_desc: Angelica dahurica, also known as Baikal angelica, teas is used to alleviate various health issues. The tea has been traditionally used to treat digestive problems such as bloating, flatulence, and diarrhea due to its carminative properties. It is also used to relieve respiratory issues like bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, thanks to its expectorant qualities. Additionally, the tea is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and menstrual cramps.

Angelica dahurica, also known as Baikal angelica, tinctures is used to alleviate various health issues. It is often employed to treat digestive problems such as nausea, diarrhea, and bloating, as well as respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Additionally, its anti-inflammatory properties make it a popular remedy for reducing pain and swelling in conditions like arthritis and menstrual cramps. The tincture can also be used topically to soothe skin irritations and wounds.

Angelica dahurica, also known as Baikal angelica, decoctions is used to alleviate a range of health concerns. It has been traditionally employed in Asian medicine to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as digestive problems like diarrhea and constipation. Additionally, its anti-inflammatory properties make it useful for reducing pain and swelling associated with injuries or inflammatory conditions. Furthermore, it is believed to have antioxidant effects that can help protect against chronic diseases.

Angelica dahurica, also known as Baikal angelica, capsules is used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health concerns. The capsules are rich in bioactive compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making them effective against digestive issues such as indigestion, diarrhea, and stomach ulcers. Additionally, they can help reduce fever, relieve respiratory problems like bronchitis, and even support immune system function to prevent illnesses.

Angelica dahurica, also known as Baikal angelica, tablets is used to treat various health issues. These tablets are traditionally used to relieve symptoms of colds and flu, such as fever, cough, and sore throat. They can also help alleviate menstrual cramps, bloating, and other symptoms associated with women's health issues. Additionally, Angelica dahurica tablets have anti-inflammatory properties that may help reduce pain and swelling in the body.

Angelica dahurica, also known as Baikal angelica, ointments is used to alleviate various health issues. Its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties make it effective in treating wounds, cuts, and abrasions, promoting faster healing and reducing the risk of infection. Additionally, its analgesic properties provide relief from pain, making it a popular remedy for joint and muscle aches, as well as menstrual cramps.

Angelica dahurica, also known as Baikal angelica, salves is used to treat a variety of health issues. It has anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties that help soothe skin irritations, wounds, and minor burns. The salve can also be applied topically to relieve joint pain and swelling associated with arthritis and other musculoskeletal conditions. Additionally, it may help calm digestive issues such as bloating and cramps.

Angelica dahurica, also known as Baikal angelica, liniments is used to treat various health issues. It has anti-inflammatory properties that help in reducing pain and swelling associated with sprains, strains, and bruises. The liniment is also effective in relieving arthritis and rheumatic pain by reducing inflammation and stiffness in joints. Additionally, it can be used to treat headaches, fever, and respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma by opening up airways and clearing congestion.

Angelica dahurica, also known as Baikal angelica, poultices is used to treat a variety of health issues. The poultice can be applied topically to reduce swelling and inflammation in the body, making it beneficial for treating conditions such as sprains, strains, and bruises. It is also said to have anti-inflammatory properties that can help alleviate pain and discomfort associated with arthritis and other joint-related disorders.

Angelica dahurica, also known as Baikal angelica, compresses is used to alleviate a range of health concerns. The warm or cool compresses can be applied topically to relieve menstrual cramps, reduce inflammation and swelling, and ease digestive issues such as constipation and indigestion. Additionally, Angelica dahurica compresses are also used to treat respiratory problems like bronchitis and asthma, and even skin conditions like eczema and acne.

intro: Angelica dahurica has several medicinal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions. These preparations are useful for alleviating respiratory issues like bronchitis and coughs due to their expectorant properties, as well as treating fever, rheumatism, and menstrual cramps. The plant's essential oil is also used in aromatherapy to relieve anxiety and stress.
intro_desc: Angelica dahurica has several medicinal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions. These preparations are useful for treating various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and inflammation. They are also used to reduce pain, improve digestion, and relieve nausea and vomiting. The roots of the plant are typically used in these preparations, as they are believed to possess the highest concentration of medicinal compounds.
